news.title: Astec Industries (ASTE) Misses Q1 Earnings Estimates
news.text: Astec Industries (ASTE) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.54 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.88 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.88 per share a year ago.

news.title: Astec Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
news.text: First Quarter 2026 Overview (all comparisons are made to the corresponding prior year first quarter unless otherwise specified): Net sales of $396.3 million Net income of $1.3 million ; Adjusted net income of $12.5 million EBITDA of $23.6 million ; Adjusted EBITDA of $30.3 million Diluted EPS of $0.06; Adjusted EPS of $0.54 Operating cash flow of $40.7 million ; Free cash flow of $32.6 million Backlog of $549.2 million grew 36.4% CHATTANOOGA, Tenn., May 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Astec Industries, Inc. (Nasdaq: ASTE) announced today its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026.
